name: TextMate

consumes.minimum: 1 active CompItem + exactly 1 selected text layer containing Source Text
consumes.description: Reads the active CompItem; reads comp.selectedLayers[0] and checks for a 'Source Text' property; reads the full text string from the TextDocument value to perform the case-sensitive string search; accesses 'ADBE Text Properties' → 'ADBE Text Animators' property group on the selected layer.

controls.name: textInput
controls.role: sets the case-sensitive search term to highlight inside the selected text layer

controls.name: OK
controls.role: captures the search term and triggers the highlight-animator creation workflow

controls.name: Cancel
controls.role: closes the dialog without creating any animators

functions: guard: alerts and exits when no active CompItem is present
guard: alerts and exits when the number of selected layers is not exactly one
guard: alerts and exits when the selected layer has no Source Text property
show a DIALOG prompting the user to enter a case-sensitive search term
guard: alerts and exits when the search term field is empty after dialog close
search the full text string for all occurrences of the search term (case-sensitive)
calculate adjusted character indices for each match by subtracting carriage-return counts before each position
guard: alerts and exits when no occurrences of the search term are found
add a text animator ('ADBE Text Animator') named 'Highlight Animator (<term>)' to the selected text layer's Animators group
add a Fill Color property ('ADBE Text Fill Color') to the new animator and set it to a randomly selected non-repeating color from a 12-color palette
for each text occurrence: add a Range Selector ('ADBE Text Selector'), set units to index mode (value 2), and set Start Offset and End Offset to the adjusted character indices
alert the user with the count of highlighted instances found
wrap all mutations in a single undo group named 'TextMate'

scriptSim.scenario: highlight two occurrences of search term
scriptSim.inputs: Active comp 'Text Comp' (1920×1080, 24fps, 10s); text layer 'Title Text' selected with Source Text 'Hello world, Hello AE'; user types 'Hello' and clicks OK

notes: Text search is strictly case-sensitive; there is no option to make it case-insensitive.
Carriage-return characters (char code 13) are excluded from character index calculations so that Range Selector indices match AE's character-level units.
Color selection rotates through a fixed palette of 12 high-contrast RGB colors; consecutive highlights are guaranteed to use different colors via lastColorIndex tracking.
All existing text animations, keyframes, and formatting are preserved — the script only adds new animators.
The script writes no AE expressions; expressions[] is empty.

cancelButton.onClick closes the dialog without setting searchTerm, so the subsequent empty-term guard fires and alerts 'No search term entered. Exiting.' — the undo group opened at the top of main() is not closed in this early-exit path.
The script requires Adobe After Effects CS6 or later.
